positive: A stylized, minimalist design featuring a large, majestic mountain silhouette set against a vibrant, swirling cosmic nebula backdrop. The composition is centered, utilizing deep indigo and sapphire blues contrasting with bright magenta and gold accents. Include subtle, geometric aurora borealis patterns flowing across the sky. The style should be highly graphic, vector-art quality, with clean, thick lines and sharp contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, clean silhouettes, deep field of view, perfect for t-shirt print, UHD, sharp focus.
negative: blurry, out of focus, text, words, logo, watermark, signature, cartoon, grainy, dirty, artifact, noise, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, low detail
